message:
chore(beads): sync issues.jsonl with expanded bead metadata

Refreshes the local .beads/issues.jsonl snapshot to capture ~64 new/updated
bead entries. The bulk of the additions cover the RaptorQ runtime pattern
extraction (bd-11g), POSIX conformance tracking beads, and several
infrastructure beads created during the FrankenLibC rename campaign.

The sync also picks up closed-state transitions and compaction-level
updates for beads that were resolved since the last snapshot, ensuring
the local ledger stays consistent with the upstream bead graph.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
